notes: 2-prompt, ~3-minute bookend session. Opens with a full paste of prior-session output from v-appydave (diff of generate-schema.md v1→v2, commit confirmations for both repos, Claude's root-cause analysis of the gap analysis failure). The prior session had already applied the fix and committed — this session does a read-only verification pass (Glob×4, Read×3, Bash×1, zero writes/edits) then closes with 'so are you suggesting any changes or not'. No mutations. File size (20KB) is almost entirely the prior-session paste, not active content. Clean archetype instance of orientation.bookend: cross-project paste as briefing, read-only verification, terse clarifying close. The embedded meta-commentary (Claude analysing its own prior analytical failure on gap analysis) is the only substantive content but belongs to the v-appydave session.
